claims.text: coachctl — Architecture & Conventions Canonical reference for the project's structure, knowledge layers, and conventions.
README.md owns setup/install/deploy; .opencode/agents/coach.md owns operational workflows.
This file is the single source of truth for architecture.

--- ## Two-repo split coachctl is published as two coupled repos : | Repo | Visibility | Contents | Watcher | |---|---|---|---| | coachctl (this repo) | public | code, general knowledge, dashboard UI source, public race captures | — | | coachctl-personal (per-athlete) | private | one athlete's wiki, secrets, activities DB, baked dashboard data, Vercel deploy surface | Vercel auto-deploy | Dependency direction is strictly one-way : the private repo depends on the public one via pip install .
